title: Scrum Master
description: Akamai is seeking a Scrum Master to support engineering teams in Sacramento. You'll facilitate agile ceremonies, remove blockers, and coach teams to deliver value faster. In this hybrid role, you'll drive continuous improvement across multiple squads, working with product managers and engineers to optimize velocity and quality.
responsibilities: Facilitate sprint planning, daily standups, retrospectives, and other agile ceremonies across assigned teams
Identify and help resolve impediments that slow team productivity; escalate blocked work quickly
Coach teams on agile practices and help them refine processes to improve efficiency
Work with product owners and stakeholders to understand priorities and manage dependencies
Track sprint metrics and health indicators; recommend process improvements based on data

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Business, or related field

benefits: Flexible work hours and hybrid options
